heading: Services for individuals with co-occurring disorders
label: 300x–66 Services for individuals with co-occurring disorders
text: States may use funds available for treatment under sections 300x and 300x–21 of this title to treat persons with co-occurring substance use disorders and mental disorders as long as funds available under such sections are used for the purposes for which they were authorized by law and can be tracked for accounting purposes.
notes: Amendments2022— substituted “substance use disorders” for “substance abuse”.Pub. L. 117–328
amendments: Amendments2022— substituted “substance use disorders” for “substance abuse”.Pub. L. 117–328
